channel.title: AI Futurist Digest
channel.description: Your daily 10-minute briefing on the most important developments in AI -- strategic foresight, technical breakthroughs, business moves, and the big picture. Like a well-read analyst catching you up over coffee.
channel.itunes:author: AI Futurist Digest
channel.itunes:summary: Your daily 10-minute briefing on the most important developments in AI -- strategic foresight, technical breakthroughs, business moves, and the big picture.

item.title: NVIDIA GTC, Pentagon vs Anthropic, and the Physical AI Frontier -- March 16, 2026
item.description: Today's digest: NVIDIA GTC 2026 kicks off with the Vera Rubin architecture unveil. The Pentagon-Anthropic standoff deepens as OpenAI and Google employees rally in support. Yann LeCun's new startup AMI raises a record $1.03B seed. The DOJ moves to preempt state AI laws. Plus: physical AI hitting production scale, the AI layoff boomerang, and China's OpenClaw agent platform.
item.itunes:summary: NVIDIA GTC 2026 kicks off with Vera Rubin. Pentagon vs Anthropic escalates. Yann LeCun raises record $1.03B seed. Physical AI hits production scale.
